zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Toucy於1231年出生在法國布格圖希時，她的父親Jean de Toucy24歲，母親Emma de Laval Dame de Laval34歲。她和Thiébaut II de Bar至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1317年4月7日在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Toucy于1231年出生在法国布格圖希时，她的父亲Jean de Toucy24岁，母亲Emma de Laval Dame de Laval34岁。她和Thiébaut II de Bar至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1317年4月7日在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Cambodian Sok, Bunthoeun, Chhom, Chhum, Choun, Eng, Heng, Hoeun, Koeun, Kosal, Samoeun, Savath, Somaly, Soun, Thoeun, Kao, Kon, Kong, Lim, Lun, Sen, Muon, Nguon, Phal, Phan, Pho, Than, Thy, Ry, Then.
Scottish (Argyll and Stirlingshire): variant of   Tulloch  .

variants.name: Tulloch
meanings: Scottish (Orkney and Shetland): habitational name from any of various places called with Gaelic tulach ‘hillock, mound’, such as Tulloch in Dingwall (Ross and Cromarty) and Tough (Aberdeenshire).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Toucy was born in 1231, in Toucy, Yonne, Burgundy, France, her father, Jean de Toucy, was 24 and her mother, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, was 34. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Thiébaut II de Bar. She died on 7 April 1317, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Toucy est née en 1231, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Jean de Toucy, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Thiébaut II de Bar. Elle est décédée le 7 avril 1317, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Toucy 1231 in Toucy, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Toucy 24 und ihre Mutter Emma de Laval Dame de Laval 34. Sie hatte mit Thiébaut II de Bar mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. April 1317 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Toucy è nata il nel 1231 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Toucy, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Thiébaut II de Bar. Morì il 7 aprile 1317, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Toucyが1231年にフランスボウルゴグンイオントウシで生まれた時，父Jean de Toucyは24歳，母Emma de Laval Dame de Lavalは34歳であった。彼女はThiébaut II de Barとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1317年4月7日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Toucy(이)가 1231년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 토우시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Toucy(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Laval Dame de Laval(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Thiébaut II de Bar(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 4월 7일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Toucy nasceu em 1231, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Jean de Toucy, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Thiébaut II de Bar. Ela faleceu em 7 de abril de 1317, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Toucy родилась в 1231 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Toucy было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Thiébaut II de Bar. Она умерла 7 апреля 1317 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Toucy nació en 1231, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Jean de Toucy, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Thiébaut II de Bar. Murió el 7 de abril de 1317, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 86 años.
